record.field: List the open activities assigned to me that are due today or already overdue, so I can plan my day.

result = ( "List the open activities assigned to me that are due today or already " "overdue, so I can plan my day.

" "1. Call the whoami tool to get my user id.
" "2. Use search_read on the 'mail.activity' model with a domain filtering " "user_id to me and date_deadline on or before today, ordered by " "date_deadline ascending. Read the summary, activity_type_id, " "date_deadline, res_model and res_name fields.
" "3. Present the results grouped as 'Overdue' and 'Due today', each line " "showing what needs doing, the related document and the due date.
" "4. Finish with a short, prioritized suggestion of what to tackle first." )
